command:
echo "=== SAKURA DETAILED CHECK ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 "
echo '--- config.yaml key fields ---'
cat /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'model|telegram|webhook|token|require_mention|mode' | head -30
echo '--- telegram webhook registered? ---'
HERMES_TOKEN=\$(grep -r 'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN\|bot_token' /home/jose/.hermes/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v bak | grep -v '#' | head -3)
echo TOKEN_CHECK: \$HERMES_TOKEN
echo '--- most recent log ---'
ls -lt /home/jose/.hermes/logs/ 2>/dev/null | head -5
LOGFILE=\$(ls -t /home/jose/.hermes/logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
echo LOGFILE: \$LOGFILE
tail -30 \$LOGFILE 2>/dev/null
echo '--- hermes version ---'
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python -m hermes_cli.main --version 2>/dev/null || cat /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/VERSION 2>/dev/null
echo '--- cloudflared tunnel active? ---'
systemctl status cloudflared --no-pager | grep -E 'Active|loaded'
" 2>&1

echo "=== REMY DETAILED CHECK ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 "
echo '--- services ---'
systemctl list-units 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'openclaw|remy|node'
find /etc/systemd /home/jose -name '*.service' 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l 'openclaw\|remy\|9119' 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo '--- home dir ---'
ls /home/jose/
echo '--- .openclaw ---'
ls /home/jose/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null
echo '--- openclaw config ---'
cat /home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps({k:v for k,v in d.items() if k not in ['token','apiKey','botToken','secret']}, indent=2))" 2>/dev/null
echo '--- npm-global openclaw ---'
ls /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i claw
echo '--- openclaw binary ---'
which openclaw 2>/dev/null || find /home/jose -name 'openclaw' -o -name 'index.js' 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo '--- ports ---'
ss -tlnp | grep -E '9119|8787|8788|443'
echo '--- nginx status ---'
systemctl status nginx --no-pager | grep -E 'Active|loaded'
echo '--- cloudflared ---'
systemctl status cloudflared --no-pager | grep -E 'Active|loaded'
echo '--- socat ---'
ps aux | grep socat | grep -v grep
echo '--- all running services ---'
systemctl list-units --state=running --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -v systemd | head -20
" 2>&1
